El Valle Studios

Stories from the valley. Historias desde el valle.

About the Company →
01 The Company · La Compañía

El Valle.

…is an inclusive, independent entertainment studio founded by actor and producer Daniel Williams-Lopez.

The Name · El Nombre

Daniel Williams-Lopez named the company for two valleys that bridged the gap between his home and his craft. El Valle in Samaná, Dominican Republic, the place he visited growing up. And the San Fernando Valley, the one he moved to with a deep-rooted history in cinema. El Valle Studios sits in between them. It's where the work begins.

01 — Development · Desarrollo

Story-first development.

We champion scripts and talent from first draft to final shoot, with patience, taste, and rigor. The story is the blueprint. Everything else follows from it.

02 — Production · Producción

Producing is a verb.

As our founder's mentor Tucker Tooley says: things only happen if you put them into action. We run lean, disciplined productions that protect the story and the crew in equal measure. And get the picture made.

03 — Partnership · Sociedad

Long-lasting creative partnership.

Our films and projects aren't one-offs. They're the start of something longer. Relationships with filmmakers, writers, and financiers who share our taste and our standards, across the work we'll make together for years to come.

Founder · Producer · Actor

Daniel Williams-Lopez

Daniel Williams-Lopez is a Dominican-American actor and producer, and the founder of El Valle Studios, an entertainment studio dedicated to bold, filmmaker-driven storytelling with global appeal. With a foundation in both physical production and creative development, Daniel brings a solutions-oriented approach to building and executing projects from the ground up.

He began his career in film in Los Angeles working across physical production alongside veteran producer Tucker Tooley on a slate of studio and streamer-backed films. That experience gave him a comprehensive understanding of both the creative and logistical demands of filmmaking at scale.

Through El Valle Studios, Williams-Lopez focuses on developing and packaging elevated, commercially viable material with a hands-on approach.

Physical Production
  • Hell Fest CBS Films
  • Concrete Cowboy Netflix
  • The United States vs. Billie Holiday Hulu
  • The Deliverance Netflix
  • Den of Thieves 2: Pantera Lionsgate · pre & post-production
  • Somedays In Post-Production
